Validate a size record for measurement output.

## Import

```ts
import { validMeasurementSize } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/reactive-layout";
```

## Signature

```ts
function validMeasurementSize(
	size: Size,
	label: string,
): Size
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `size` | `Size` | Size to validate. |
| `label` | `string` | Label used in the error message. |

## Returns

The validated size.

## Example

```ts
validMeasurementSize({ width: 10, height: 20 }, "image");
```

`packages/ts/src/solutions/reactive-layout/measurements.ts`
